seoTitle: Mount Seaview vs Mount Tenandra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Seaview and Mount Tenandra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Seaview vs Mount Tenandra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Seaview and Mount Tenandra.
heading: Mount Seaview vs Mount Tenandra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Seaview, New South Wales and Mount Tenandra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Seaview has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Mount Tenandra (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Seaview or Mount Tenandra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Seaview has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Mount Tenandra scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Seaview scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Tenandra scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Seaview or Mount Tenandra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Seaview has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
